title: Putin Said the War ‘Is Coming to a Close,’ but That’s Not All He Said
summary_full: The Russian leader is walking a tightrope: acknowledging public discontent while offering no indication that he might give up on his demands.
summary_public: The Russian leader is walking a tightrope: acknowledging public discontent while offering no indication that he might give up on his demands.
